title: CommunityScorecard
description: Output of s5_scoring.py. Contains dimension scores, composite, tier, override flags, and confidence. This object is the sole input to s6_synthesis.py along with verified facts.

composite_score.description: Weighted sum of all dimension scores × weights. Computed by s5_scoring.py.

composite_score_rounded.description: Composite rounded to 1 decimal place for display

tier.description: Tier from scoring_weights.yaml thresholds, modified by override flags

tier_display_label.description: Human-readable label from tier_thresholds in scoring_weights.yaml

override_flags.description: Active override flags. Each can cap or modify the tier.

triggered_by.description: The fact or condition that triggered this flag

tier_effect.description: How this flag changed the tier, if at all

confidence_overall.description: Minimum confidence across the 3 highest-weighted dimensions per scoring_weights.yaml aggregation rule.

facts_used.description: DataPoint IDs that fed into scoring. Enables traceability.

dimensions_with_missing_data.description: Dimensions where key facts were unavailable. Confidence downgraded.

scoring_notes.description: Any analyst notes about unusual scoring conditions

weight.description: Weight applied from preset. Will sum to 1.0 across all dimensions.

weighted_contribution.description: score × weight. Sums to composite_score across all dimensions.

primary_driver.description: One-line explanation of what drove this score

supporting_fact_ids.description: DataPoint IDs used to compute this dimension score

used_default.description: True if no relevant facts were available and default/midpoint was used
